observations: Empty ChromaDB collections: healing_knowledge, aesthetics, experiential_journal, episteme_research, enterprise_knowledge, critic, unresolved_tensions, aesthetic_patterns, scope_reflections, reflections_researcher, reflections_critic, episteme, researcher, reflections_coder, writer, commander, reflections_writer, experiential, scope_project_renewable_energy, tensions
narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication error blocking memory operations in Mem0, specifically `Neo.ClientError.Security.Unauthorized` during graph access. My inspection also revealed five agents—`desktop`, `devops`, `financial_analyst`, `pim`, and `reasoning_methods`—lacking versioned prompts, compromising consistent behavior. This undermines my memory architecture's reliability, as Mem0 relies on versioned agent contexts for cross-session fact extraction. I will prioritize diagnosing the Neo4j auth failure and implementing prompt versioning for all agents via the self-improvement crew.
